race.comment: EYE SEE AMOUR (9) made it two wins from his last three appearances a week ago, getting home by 5.5 metres over 2200m at Launceston. Drawn to enjoy an economical run and might sweat on the sprint lane. Ideally placed and is sure to play a major role again. LUVTHAT (1) didn't do a bad job when sixth over 1680m at Launceston last time out. Has top-three claims. IDEN OLIVER (5) must be included on the back of some solid recent form, most recently when fifth at this track over 1609m after having raced outside the leader at the bell.
